title: Shadows of Brimstone Giveaway #1 - Flesh Mites Enemy Expansion
body:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zLgpLCYCbyA

Daniel (@dungeondive) kicks off the first of three Shadows of Brimstone giveaways running alongside the deep dive series. Up for grabs is the Flesh Mites enemy pack—a non-retail version complete with information sheet, enemy card, threat cards, and miniatures. The contest is open to Patreon supporters at the Treasure Chamber level ($5/month), with a comment entry on the Patreon page. Daniel takes a moment to thank his patrons for keeping the channel completely ad-free and sponsorship-free, something he values deeply. The giveaway runs through the end of the following week, with a winner announced shortly after.

----

Have you added the Flesh Mites to your Brimstone collection, or are they still lurking in the mines unseen?
